title: Inngest approval + Cloud account
description: Written approval to add Inngest dependency and Cloud account; unblocks npm install inngest.
acceptance: Decision logged in implementation-plan.md; B-ORCH-001 unblocked.

title: Langfuse self-host vs Cloud decision
description: Choose observability stack for agent traces.
acceptance: Decision recorded; F-OBS-001 unblocked.

title: Agency hierarchy sign-off (migration 000014)
description: Approve agencies table migration 000014.
acceptance: Product + Eng sign-off on hierarchy schema.

title: Dify Brain + Creator publish
description: Publish Strategic Brain and Creator apps in Dify Studio; workspace API keys configured.
acceptance: npm run ai:verify exits 0.
verify: npm run ai:verify; npm run verify:staging

title: PDPL data flow review
description: Security sign-off for memory/FinOps data flows.
acceptance: Security approval documented.

title: Apply migration 000013 (operator)
description: Apply draft migration 000013: decision ledger, experiments, budget policies, failed_jobs optional.
acceptance: npm run schema:verify:004 passes with extended checks.

title: Wire reconciler to publish worker
description: Link AI CMO campaigns to 003 publish pipeline via reconciler.
acceptance: Campaign content reaches publish worker; aligns with B-ORCH-007.
verify: npm test; npm run worker:dev integration

title: Wire campaign to post via reconciler (post_id FK)
description: Set ai_cmo_campaigns.post_id via reconciler; post enters 003 pipeline.
acceptance: post_id FK populated; integration campaign to scheduled post.

title: Install Inngest + API route
description: Add inngest dep, api/inngest/route.ts, inngest-client.ts.
acceptance: Inngest dev server receives functions.
verify: npm run typecheck; Inngest dev smoke

title: Publish Dify Strategic Brain + Creator apps
description: User action in Dify Studio to publish apps used by Strategic Brain and Creator agents.
acceptance: npm run ai:verify exit 0.

title: Install Inngest + inngest route (engineering)
description: Same as S14-T001 engineering deliverable.
acceptance: Inngest functions registered; CI allows dependency.

title: Port runCampaignWorkflow to Inngest steps
description: Durable workflow with 3 retries; idempotent steps.
acceptance: Campaign workflow runs on Inngest with retries.

title: Event bus to orchestration bridge
description: Replan enqueued from marketing events via Inngest send.
acceptance: Event publish creates replan job within one worker cycle.

title: Deprecate legacy ai-orchestration BRPOP
description: Single orchestration path documented; remove dual queue.
acceptance: 003 publish regression unchanged.

title: Outcome job post_analytics to campaign_outcomes
description: Sync outcomes from post_analytics into ai_cmo_campaign_outcomes.
acceptance: 80% campaigns have outcome within 48h of publish.
verify: Job unit test; npm run worker:dev

title: Optimizer agent production loop
description: Cron/Inngest trigger for optimizer; writes learnings via reconciler.
acceptance: >=1 learning row per completed campaign.

title: Apply budget_policies section of 000013
description: Enable ai_cmo_budget_policies table with RLS.
acceptance: Table queryable under workspace RLS.

title: MV refresh cron (cost + attribution)
description: Hourly REFRESH for cost and attribution materialized views.
acceptance: Dashboards not stale >1h.

title: Attribution event ingestion
description: Persist UTM and webhook events to ai_cmo_attribution_events via reconciler.
acceptance: Attribution events persisted and queryable.

title: ai_cmo_approval_requests table + API
description: Human approval queue; CRITICAL content never auto-publishes.
acceptance: API creates/updates approval requests with RLS.

title: LLM-as-Judge evaluation job
description: Post-Creator evaluation rows in ai_cmo_evaluations.
acceptance: Judge job runs after content generation.

title: circuit-breaker on Dify/OpenRouter
description: Resilience for external LLM calls (gap H7).
acceptance: Breaker opens on sustained failures; graceful degradation.

title: Per-workspace rate limits (service-role)
description: Rate limit AI CMO API by workspace (gap C7).
acceptance: Over-limit requests rejected with clear error.

title: Apply migration 000014 (agencies)
description: Apply agencies hierarchy migration to Supabase.
acceptance: schema verify passes; agencies table live.

title: Playwright AI CMO smoke E2E
description: End-to-end smoke for AI CMO happy path (gap M15).
acceptance: Playwright suite green in CI.
verify: npx playwright test (AI CMO smoke spec)

title: Meta publish until App Review approved
description: Production Facebook/Instagram publish blocked until Meta App Review flag approved.
acceptance: DB flag approved; live publish verified.

title: Phase 1 UAT OAuth schedule live publish
description: Operator UAT: OAuth through schedule to live publish.
acceptance: UAT script signed off in LAUNCH_CHECKLIST.

title: CI schema gate on main (zero PGRST205)
description: Enable schema verification gate on main branch CI.
acceptance: CI fails on schema drift; zero PGRST205.

title: Materialized view refresh cron
description: Alias for D-FIN-004 MV refresh worker job.
acceptance: Hourly refresh scheduled in worker.

title: Event-driven replan production
description: Production replanning from marketing events.
acceptance: Replan flows triggered reliably from event bus.
